hash_33b121b01a78e9: yïŋ―~3+#8ß­ïŋ―H3X4fen: ^7Well...it doesn't really go with mein uniform, but it rains death quite effectively.
hash_33b321b01a7c4f: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7At least Nikolai will go out with big bang...bang-bang.
hash_33b421b01a7e02: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Not the most elegant weapon, but the demons I kill will care not a jot.
hash_69aef2983b5ac6: ^1Nikolai: ^7Is just copy of Russian Bowski Knife.
hash_9d53461ccd9cd0: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Look! On the rooftop! Oh, that is sneaky...
hash_9d54461ccd9e83: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7A crawler with the sense to take the high ground is a crawler worth killin'.
hash_9d56461ccda1e9: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I see you up there, my electric enemy!
hash_9d59461ccda702: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7They'd be a teensie bit harder to spot if they weren't right up there in plain sight!
hash_e2632cffea8000: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Raise a glass to my victory! I know I will!
hash_e2692cffea8a32: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Did it hurt? I HOPE IT HURT!
hash_e38b48f382d706: ^1Rushmore: ^7There's a particular Nova 6 Crawler somewhere on the grounds that I need you to find.     It's having an unusual reaction to Element 115 and I would very much like to analyze it.
hash_e9a2a3ee59dc11: ^1Takeo: ^7Our Nikolai is the one who possesses new-found wisdom. You? You appear only to possess red and sweaty face.
hash_eb695aa3dbda1c: ^1Richtofen: ^7Maxis? I know we've had our differences, but PLEASE tell me you're okay...
hash_108fdc51ac08265: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Wow Tak! I've always had a soft spot for you, but that nearly brought a tear to my eye!
hash_141427a67782360: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I was trained to fight with shovel. This is...better.
hash_141457a67782879: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I will show you all the proper use for a blade.
hash_141487a67782d92: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I can see my reflection in this blade! Handsome devil...
hash_15f8a69722b7603: ^1Nikolai: ^7I will break you -- one at time or all together!
hash_15f8c69722b7969: ^1Richtofen: ^7Sometimes I amaze myself. Often in fact.
hash_16794f40b3b611f: ^1Richtofen: ^7Did the Kronorium tell you to get surrounded?
hash_16795f40b3b62d2: ^1Dempsey: ^7Don't worry Nikolai, maybe they just want your soul!
hash_16797f40b3b6638: ^1Takeo: ^7Trust me, Nikolai, your soul will survive.
hash_17621969f013a43: ^1Takeo: ^7I try to be...minimalist. But this is too minimal.
hash_1762c969f014cf4: ^1Richtofen: ^7Why not just give me a butter knife? Or some verdammt nail-clippers?!
hash_1762e969f01505a: ^1Nikolai: ^7One pistol. One million hell-pigs. One dead Nikolai.
hash_18a756df32bab61: ^1Takeo: ^7Hm. When was the last time anyone fed the dogs around here?
hash_1a73b8482d20bed: ^1Richtofen: ^7Not having a good day, are you?
hash_1d7b11345de9f70: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7You should fear me -- not crave me!?!
hash_1d7b31345dea2d6: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Come get some! You won't be back for more!
hash_1d7b41345dea489: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Oh dear, I may have made miscalculation...
hash_1d7b61345dea7ef: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7You know, there was a time you and I were not so different.
hash_1e03b04a739b708: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I am big plough -- you are Hell-pig field!
hash_1e03c04a739b8bb: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Oo-RAH! Dempsey just got ya on the leader board!
hash_1e04104a739c13a: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Oh, my children, you just got Richtofened.
hash_1e391d09ee5c599: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7OW! What are you, the undead Max Schmeling?!
hash_1e393d09ee5c8ff: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Imperialist pig-dogs! And that was before you became hell-pigs!
hash_1e394d09ee5cab2: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Oww! That was my favorite patch of skin!
hash_1f714ef0306c329: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I see. The Nova 6 Crawlers are a force multiplier.     Sort of the opposite of our Nikolai.
hash_1f715ef0306c4dc: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Aw, shit. That gas is ampin' up the maggotheads!
hash_1f716ef0306c68f: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7There! You see? Stink-pigs make hell-pigs strong and fast!
hash_1f717ef0306c842: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I see! Crawlers release gas, and other demons grow stronger!    Takeo must throw up in mouth now.
hash_20b4a20f105bf6b: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Even at distance, my blade will find you!
hash_20b4b20f105c11e: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Is like sticking pin in globe! If globe was trying to devour you...
hash_20b4c20f105c2d1: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7If yer wonderin' 'bout all the bleedin', it's because you got stabbed.     By me.
hash_20b4d20f105c484: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Hold onto that for me, would you?
hash_225368646e75d89: ^1Rushmore: ^7Okay, think you can get this one to the Transfusion Facility in one piece?

hash_4122b6c76f551af: ^1Richtofen: ^7You're making a habit of this. It's starting to get on my nerves.

hash_47d9195845328fc: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7A Mark II in my hands makes me feel...mmmm...it makes me feel...

hash_48c2408e44d9864: ^1Richtofen: ^7For a man as refined as me to be stopped by something as vulgar as money--!
hash_48c2608e44d9bca: ^1Nikolai: ^7Money will not kill me. Lack of money just might.
hash_48c2708e44d9d7d: ^1Dempsey: ^7Yeah, yeah, money talks, bullshit walks. I'm walkin'...

hash_49d94c59498a0c4: ^1Dempsey: ^7Looks like I just rolled craps.     Crap.
hash_49d95c59498a277: ^1Nikolai: ^7A little pistol is dangerous thing...especially when you need much bigger gun.
hash_49d97c59498a5dd: ^1Richtofen: ^7That feeling when you order an entree and you get an amuse-bouche.

hash_4b592b35a319b30: ^1Dempsey: ^7Sitting here on my ass bleeding out is not a winning strategy.
hash_4b593b35a319ce3: ^1Nikolai: ^7This will not keep me down. We Russians always fight back!
hash_4b595b35a31a049: ^1Richtofen: ^7I'll just be over here slowly dying if anyone needs me.
hash_4b5a0b35a31b2fa: ^1Takeo: ^7There is little honor in sitting in a pool of my own blood. Some help would be appreciated.

hash_a633e5dd9c2cc6f: ^1Dempsey: ^7Trip over your own feet, did you?

hash_1128dd4e0fcda79b: ^1Rushmore: ^7Attention Intruders! What part of "report to Operations" did you fail to understand?    Should I repeat myself in Russian? Just kidding: Russians get shot here in Camp Edward.     Love it or leave it!

hash_11386a805df32054: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7"Camp Edward." Is just other way of saying Potemkin Village.
hash_11386b805df32207: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7It's good to be stateside, but this ain't exactly where the dames are.

hash_119ac775de1d2dbf: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7This is as close as I will come to being samurai. It is close enough.

hash_11e5b718c3b3d781: ^1Takeo: ^7A warrior without armor is like a house without a roof.

hash_12104c34d9022324: ^1Dempsey: ^7That's the way to do it, brother. You show 'em!

hash_127541f5da1b3986: ^1Takeo: ^7Anyone else wish they had more bullets?

hash_1326cf20b4db64de: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I've had enough of you meatheads!
hash_1326d020b4db6691: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7You see, German? I can do Ragnarok, too!
hash_1326d220b4db69f7: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Keep it down! I am trying to work!
hash_132fd9d22106d546:
ïŋ―um/ïŋ―ïŋ―JUQNïŋ―ïŋ―[ïŋ―ïŋ―
OWïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―Y ïŋ―ïŋ―^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Bravo, Sergeant A.D.A.M.! Do it again!
hash_13461f2b7caa6db3: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Bravo, Sergeant A.D.A.M.! Do it again!
hash_1346222b7caa72cc: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Sergeant A.D.A.M. cuts through demons like hot katana through tofu!
hash_1346242b7caa7632: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Y'see what that robot just did? I oughtta sell tickets!
hash_1346252b7caa77e5: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Ha! Robot is deadly like Dempsey -- minus stupid mouth!
hash_1353d323e90f1bf2: ^1Rushmore: ^7Intruders...er, honored guests...please locate a secret project of mine. The Elemental Orb.
hash_1373fd07660e5a01: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Indeed. Truly, we are much more similar than perhaps we realize.     Really.
hash_1376e98925207737: ^1Dempsey: ^7Full power unlocked on the Ragnarok DG5.
hash_138e403a78349796: ^1Takeo: ^7You wound me, demon. I will have retribution.
hash_138e4a3a7834a894: ^1Dempsey: ^7Gonna rip that arm off and make you eat it!
hash_138e4b3a7834aa47: ^1Nikolai: ^7German hell-pigs, Russian hell-pigs, American hell-pigs -- no wonder Nikolai is tired!
hash_138e4d3a7834adad: ^1Richtofen: ^7Perhaps I had that coming, but, anyway, FUCK YOU!
hash_13906ad98d56aff8: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I do not carry around that kind of cash. It ruins the line of mein pants.
hash_13906fd98d56b877: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Only one thing here will pay for this. The wages of Death!
hash_139070d98d56ba2a: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Sorry. I am still not familiar with exchange rate. How much is that in rubles?
hash_139071d98d56bbdd: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Yeah? Well there's plenty of walkin' dollar signs around here. I'll be right back.
hash_13987a193a8bd168: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Enough gloating, Dempsey. A true marksman celebrates silently!
hash_13987d193a8bd681: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7If anyone needs bullet in head,  Dempsey is very accurate!
hash_13987f193a8bd9e7: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Hey Dempsey! Nikolai's somewhere nearby -- if you want to shoot something else in the head.
hash_13a87340ec3d35df: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Considerin' we spent the last few months bein' trussed up, tortured and experimented on, I'd say we traded up!
hash_13aee7fa5a5a1e58: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Gonna need more ammo before long.
hash_13aee8fa5a5a200b: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Soon I will need more bullets, or different gun.
hash_13aee9fa5a5a21be: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Hope I find more bullets soon...
hash_13aeeefa5a5a2a3d: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I'll be needing more ammo soon. Anyone feeling charitable?
hash_13bb516316d3057b: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Free spay and neuter! Right this way!
hash_13bb546316d30a94: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Here comes death on four legs...
hash_13bb566316d30dfa: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Always sounds like they're ringin' the dinner bell.
hash_13bb576316d30fad: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Animal cruelty. It comes with territory.
hash_13ddf9a217ac91ca: ^1Takeo: ^7Here it is. The thing that I sought.
hash_13e89a3a158e0abc: ^1Nikolai: ^7Other parts are needed to be truly useful.
hash_13e89b3a158e0c6f: ^1Dempsey: ^7With the right parts, this thing could be a real asset.
hash_13eef42b610060dd: ^1Richtofen: ^7Sorry, Dempsey, did you just shout something about "arseholes"??
hash_13f5373f0d5cf09b: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I suppose the blade is recoverable, but...ewwww.
hash_13f53a3f0d5cf5b4: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I would be unhygienic to eat with that knife.
hash_13f53c3f0d5cf91a: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Hey puss-bag! You feel a prick? You sure should!
hash_13f53d3f0d5cfacd: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Huh. Lucky shot. I can barely see straight right now...
hash_14024e980a662028: ^1Dempsey: ^7I know the Mark II works, but it looks like a fucking cereal box prize.
hash_14024f980a6621db: ^1Nikolai: ^7I'll take it! Nikolai is no fool...    Well...Fat Nikolai is...
hash_140251980a662541: ^1Richtofen: ^7Always good to see an old friend. Especially a deadly one.
hash_145e5a3e30628db3: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7That shook the pillars of heaven.
hash_145e5d3e306292cc: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Like being struck by lightning, right?
hash_145e5f3e30629632: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Who spiked the punch? It was me.
hash_147ea5233b0dae1f: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7You will not kill Nikolai. Only Nikolai can kill Nikolai!
hash_14a132c4426a9c7a: ^1Dempsey: ^7"A tactical rifle! The day is saved!" Said no one ever.
hash_14a133c4426a9e2d: ^1Nikolai: ^7Dependable. Like mother's hunting rifles. Before Stalin took them.
hash_14b287db137ae199: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7This Rushmore is playing me like a pawn. And I am at least a rook...or a queen.
hash_14b289db137ae4ff: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Rushmore has more values than Nikolai has ex-wives...!
hash_14b28adb137ae6b2: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I am a patient man. But I have my limits.
hash_14b35cc487c385fd: ^1Richtofen: ^7Surely following orders is its own reward, Dempsey? Or should I call you Tank? To avoid any confusion?
hash_14b5ed692052b5ae: ^1Rushmore: ^7Oh! Oh, dear! Okay, new plan: restart the power before my batteries die!    Please hurry! I have too much to live for!    Give me liberty, or give me...never mind, just switch on the power!
hash_14b8fc04055c2b9e: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Aw, no. That gas is ampin' up the maggotheads!
hash_14ce0620a69386f7: ^1Avogadro: ^7Still running Richtofen? You know you are running out of time, don't you?
hash_14d1e3bc53718a6c: ^1Takeo: ^7When this is over, I will mount you on the wall -- beneath my father's sword.
hash_14d1e8bc537192eb: ^1Richtofen: ^7Ja, this will serve my needs -- und serve my foes their just desserts. Very JUST.
hash_14d1e9bc5371949e: ^1Dempsey: ^7Time for some target practice. Easy days.
hash_14d1eabc53719651: ^1Nikolai: ^7Hm. Not made in Russia, but I think comrade Kalashnikov would approve.     Were he not died.
hash_14d3b4999572e6b0: ^1Dempsey: ^7Listen up -- you're all about to get bruised. Badly.
hash_14d3b7999572ebc9: ^1Richtofen: ^7Not as scary as the prison. Not even close.
hash_14d3c2999572fe7a: ^1Takeo: ^7These are dark times, but I believe the dawn will soon be upon us.
hash_14eae7c162ebb8d2: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to start charging ammo canister
hash_14f0b641c6ccd820: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Don't let the floor hit ya on your way out.
hash_14f0b741c6ccd9d3: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I could get used to this.
hash_14f0b841c6ccdb86: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I strike the blow that lays them low!
hash_14f0bd41c6cce405: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Ooh! I think I saw your fillings spark!
hash_14f398ae7c65309c: ^1Richtofen: ^7Ja, Overkill, you are at the height of your power.
hash_15135bd20b32c730: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Sorry I did not help sooner. I was very busy not helping.
hash_15135cd20b32c8e3: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7One of these days I might just let you to bleed to death.
hash_15135ed20b32cc49: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Are you usually this clumsy, Richtofen?
hash_151de6142678012e: ^1Dempsey: ^7Watch your step, Doc -- there's a lot of oil on the ground.
hash_151de714267802e1: ^1Nikolai: ^7You are crazy, Richtofen -- but at least you know I am important man.
hash_151f48d6639956c2: ^1Rushmore: ^7Access to the Ray Gun Mark II Frame granted. You better be qualified to use this thing.
hash_15229cbd62fc5318: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Yes. We will carve a bloody path through a sea of demons.
hash_15229ebd62fc567e: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Got some hot lead to spray? I'm your man.
hash_15229fbd62fc5831: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7S.M.G. Submarine gun. Is waterproof, yes?
hash_1522a1bd62fc5b97: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7The trick with these is not to unload prematurely.
hash_1537a4fa2c9f8cf9: ^1Takeo: ^7I see you, Richtofen, but I face my own plight!
hash_1537adfa2c9f9c44: ^1Nikolai: ^7You are not first Richtofen I have seen die. You will not be last.
hash_1537aefa2c9f9df7: ^1Dempsey: ^7I know I should try to be encouraging, but you SUCK, Richtofen!
hash_15729e42b8074db5: ^1Dempsey: ^7Don't get disheartened, Nikolai. You're doing great.
hash_15761ceb7f9e7713: ïŋ―cïŋ―ïŋ―nïŋ―gïŋ―ïŋ―2ïŋ―oïŋ―ïŋ―É*ïŋ―#ïŋ―]ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―]0dØïŋ―uÓđïŋ―lïŋ―yvsXyïŋ―}ïŋ―3ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―Q%ïŋ―;ïŋ―s \ïŋ―åŦ#\ïŋ―ïŋ―v#ïŋ―Rïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―zST@xïŋ― 5\,kïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―fïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―h\ïŋ―/4=en: ^7If anyone has a spare moment, come over here before I bleed out, bitte?
hash_157a63a577169043: ïŋ―ïŋ―h\ïŋ―/4=en: ^7If anyone has a spare moment, come over here before I bleed out, bitte?
hash_157a64a5771691f6: ^1Dempsey: ^7MEDIC!     No, seriously, I need a medic.
hash_157a65a5771693a9: ^1Nikolai: ^7Help me up and I will win battle for us!
hash_157a6ea57716a2f4: ^1Takeo: ^7The only thing worse than dying is sitting here unable to help my friends.
hash_158303cd4dc6a8cb: ^1Richtofen: ^7Well done, monkey. You retired with a perfect record. You're still Chimp-ion!
hash_158304cd4dc6aa7e: ^1Dempsey: ^7Hope you get to monkey heaven, monkey.
hash_158d04185af74600: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I wish my Nikolai knew how to shoot straight...     Or in fact do anything of use.
hash_158d0b185af751e5: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Now THAT's how you slice a melon!
hash_159557295b62f5db: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Oh, the dishonor of falling in combat. Forgive me, brothers! I let you down!
hash_159558295b62f78e: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Hrhh. Is like old saying: "Fools Russian where angels fear to tread."
hash_159559295b62f941: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Man down! Man down!    That's right, I'm talkin' about me.
hash_15955a295b62faf4: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Time out! I just need a moment to gather my thoughts -- and my intestines...
hash_15a0b309392d05fc: ^1Avogadro: ^7Even your most destructive weapon would barely register as a blip on my radar.  Know this -- you mortals will not claim the shard.  It is I who will enter Agartha. I am the new dominant life form on this world.
hash_15c975c42faa6aaf: ^1Richtofen: ^7Oooh...! Not often we go poking around in your country's business, is it Dempsey? Haha!
hash_15ebd23ac8445898: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I'd say somethin' about makin' you my bitch...but I'm better'n that. I'm a fuckin' grownup.    Dickface dog...
hash_15ebd33ac8445a4b: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Imagine team of such dogs pulling sled...     Never mind. They are better dead.
hash_15ebd43ac8445bfe: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7The secret is to conquer your fear, stand your ground, and shoot a lot.     Especially the last part.
hash_15ebd93ac844647d: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7You know, a raw egg mixed in with your meals would have given your coat a nice, healthy sheen.
hash_16050dde03e212f2: ^1Dempsey: ^7Do you need to ask Nikolai for help?
hash_16050ede03e214a5: ^1Nikolai: ^7Hey, German! At least try not to get surrounded.
hash_16078c045a2c76d5: ^1Takeo: ^7I am not one to waste electricity. But this will not be waste.
hash_16078e045a2c7a3b: ^1Dempsey: ^7This job ain't exactly fun, but it does have its moments.

hash_1619a9bab7538e5b: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Nothing is ever easy for poor Takeo.
hash_1619aabab753900e: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Nikolai actually flunk sniper school. I assume you know this, Box?
hash_1619abbab75391c1: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7This might nail those crawlers on the roofs, but that's about it.
hash_1619acbab7539374: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7A sniper rifle! Or, as I like to call them, "Bang, I'm dead!"
hash_16266c704abf1d10: ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―dïŋ―K7ïŋ―lïŋ―mïŋ―^t$ïŋ―Ô―ïŋ―|ïŋ―bÖïŋ―;Wïŋ―Cïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―_ŅĩŌđyïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―1t611:t5&;!:0t <1t68;7k far too many times to try and wriggle out of our big finale now...
hash_163c88b9abfc6dd3: ^1Dempsey: ^7Nothing good's gonna happen until I find more ammo.
hash_163c89b9abfc6f86: ^1Richtofen: ^7No ammo -- the bane of my existence.
hash_163c96b9abfc859d: ^1Takeo: ^7I will not last long with an empty gun in my hand.
hash_164d13bad7ed55c7: ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―dïŋ―K7ïŋ―lïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―Oïŋ―)qGïŋ―\ïŋ―ïŋ―!\ïŋ―\a}Wïŋ―Wâïŋ―Ô{Í―nïŋ―ïŋ―/ïŋ―,!010t>!' t <1t&=3< t5mount of confidence.     Especially knowing that you must be holding in lots of juicy secrets.
hash_1655b6cf196e153e: ^1Peter McCain: ^7And discrete. See how I didn't embarrass you by telling everyone exactly who Phoebe is?
hash_1655d32f3242f582: ^1Rushmore: ^7That server is little more than an expensive paperweight now. Reattempt, and be quick about it.
hash_1657ada3163be378: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7What happened, Richtofen? Nuke go off?
hash_1657aea3163be52b: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I will help you. It is way of communism.
hash_1657afa3163be6de: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7When you fall, I will help you rise.
hash_16c3f3a5e7af77ac: ^1Richtofen: ^7Oh, monkey, my tragic hero. I see such weltschmerz in your eyes.
hash_16c3f5a5e7af7b12: ^1Nikolai: ^7There should be monkey-medal for you. Hero of Simian Union.
hash_16c3f6a5e7af7cc5: ^1Dempsey: ^7"Improvise, adapt, overcome." Marines say it, monkey lives it.
hash_16c3f8a5e7af802b: ^1Takeo: ^7They call you "monkey," but Takeo knows you are really ape.
hash_16c57108c3dcfffc: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Seriously though, "Edward," what do you really think about our other selves? I mean, you must be doing cartwheels with another you on the scene!
hash_16d100966a86e9dc: ^1Takeo: ^7Out of ammo? This is not good.
hash_16d106966a86f40e: ^1Dempsey: ^7Shit. Gotta scare up some more ammo, pronto.
hash_16f7c6085ded5448: ^1Avogadro: ^7You were touched by the Aether. Why did you not ascend like me? Were you afraid Edward?
hash_17029d5f96b465a9: ^1Richtofen: ^7I would thank you profusely, but I'd rather just get on with it.
hash_1702a85f96b4785a: ^1Takeo: ^7I am more eager than ever to vanquish the horde...
hash_1710cffa58f65b70: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I have a bad history with rockets, but I'll give it another go. Why not?
hash_1710d4fa58f663ef: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7"Hellion Salvo." Such an elaborate appellation.
hash_1710d5fa58f665a2: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I will name each rocket after my ex-wives. I have enough.
hash_1710d6fa58f66755: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7They say I have a chip on my shoulder. Who wants to meet the chip.
hash_1733ba2742f0f9ac: ^1Nikolai: ^7Worst fate imaginable would be to come back as these creatures.
hash_1733bc2742f0fd12: ^1Richtofen: ^7What do these things eat that gives them such...backfire?
hash_1733c12742f10591: ^1Takeo: ^7Gas Crawlers. Though they have no dignity, no soul... I take no pleasure in killing them.
hash_1736afbe1b6bd2d6: ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―dïŋ―K7ïŋ―lïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―?ïŋ―+ïŋ―R4ïŋ―ïŋ―c5ïŋ―|ïŋ―&äĐĘīsDYeMïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―t-;!&t&5:025 <1&xt=?olai. Was he someone you looked up to?
hash_173c9fbf0bcdd91d: ^1Richtofen: ^7What did I do to deserve this?
hash_17414e68042d495b: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7You're being very melodramatic, Takeo! And coming from me that's really...that's really saying something.
hash_1756a28cb46a6156: ^1Takeo: ^7Blades are sacred. They should not be thrown away.
hash_1756ac8cb46a7254: ^1Dempsey: ^7Look at this -- a long-distance letter opener!
hash_1756ad8cb46a7407: ^1Nikolai: ^7Well, at least it does not run out of bullets.
hash_17714717923cdcf6: ^1Takeo: ^7What is a country mile? Can you convert that to kilometers?
hash_17715117923cedf4: ^1Dempsey: ^7What, is there a couch and a T.V. In there? Maybe some cold brews?
hash_17715217923cefa7: ^1Nikolai: ^7But you are still ghost in machine, no?
hash_17715417923cf30d: ^1Richtofen: ^7I would ask what's the difference, but you probably have to be a disembodied soul to understand.
hash_1788189dd0b8871e: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Your hands are cold, but your heart, it's...in the right place...I guess?
hash_17881a9dd0b88a84: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Ha! Just testing, robot. You pass!
hash_17881b9dd0b88c37: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I'll make this up to ya. Change your spark-plugs or somethin'...
hash_17adfe666d84ad4b: ^1Richtofen: ^7I didn't have to shoot you in the head, but I thought it was the best option all round.
hash_17adff666d84aefe: ^1Dempsey: ^7Right between the eyes! Shame...I was hoping to hit at least one of them.
hash_17ae00666d84b0b1: ^1Nikolai: ^7I am good at shooting. Very good.
hash_17aeacfa767675bb: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Come, mein Children -- I've set up an exciting new play area for you!
hash_17aeaffa76767ad4: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I am in no mood for Mercy.
hash_17aeb1fa76767e3a: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Can't wait to see their goofy faces when this goes off!
hash_17aeb2fa76767fed: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Hello Hell-pigs! This is not trap -- definitely not.
hash_17cdb92b664d9aad: ^1Dempsey: ^7We fought our way out of an Evil Prison, Richtofen... and you looked really scared - for the first time.  (beat)  Question is why?
hash_17ce2c2af25fe0a4: ^1Takeo: ^7I would request that you not be so flippant. Many of us have endured suffering beyond what you may realize.
hash_17e86673b938ebb9: ^1Computer System: ^7Facility Transport via Pyramid Device is now available.
hash_17f86af9c5a89e4e: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Activate APD Emergency Teleport
hash_18172fcb8f2c1536: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I swear I'll put anything down my throat.
hash_181731cb8f2c189c: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Is necessary evil. Certainly tastes evil...
hash_181732cb8f2c1a4f: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Here's to swimmin' with bowlegged women.
hash_181734cb8f2c1db5: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Keep it down, Takeo. You do not want to taste that twice.
hash_1818aa4a667e81c8: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Not quite useless, but close enough.
hash_1818af4a667e8a47: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Did I do something to anger or antagonize you, Box?
hash_1818b04a667e8bfa: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I am used to such disappointment. This is only "par for course."
hash_1818b14a667e8dad: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Great. Do I have to fill it with water first?
hash_1818f76908b5798b: ^1Rushmore: ^7You hear that? We have him now. Go to the central panel to initiate prisoner transport.
hash_181f82fc25f48ad7: ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―dïŋ―K7ïŋ―lïŋ―,ïŋ―oteïŋ―R4ïŋ―ïŋ―a6ïŋ―Wïŋ―ïŋ―ClÂM4rïŋ―ïŋ―yMîūïŋ―ïŋ―&t';!8tyyt1'$17=588-t5t a young age -- is a tragedy I do not particularly want to recount...
hash_1825d5d9e842f876: ^1Richtofen: ^7Good idea -- you have a little lie-down!
hash_1825e871d6c2acd6: ^1Rushmore: ^7The Elemental Orb was designed to contain and safely transport a human life force.    It should provide Deputy Director McCain with a better vessel for his life force than that android he's been trapped inside.    Freedom is not free!
hash_182a80fdf38f77d4: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Who knows? Who does he speak of?
hash_182bace0bfb91679: ^1Richtofen: ^7Believe it or not, I'm a hero!
hash_1837cbd68f1045b3: ^1Dempsey: ^7I thought you looked weak -- and I was 100 percent right!
hash_1837ccd68f104766: ^1Richtofen: ^7We Germans are nothing if not efficient.
hash_1837d9d68f105d7d: ^1Takeo: ^7And so they fall like cherry blossoms. Made of rotten flesh.

hash_1e55b5af15da9d05: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Great Tactics there, Nik. That called the "Russian Fuck-me-up"?
hash_1e64a24732cc3e0c: ^1Dempsey: ^7Looks like a toy, but it doesn't play games.
hash_1e64a34732cc3fbf: ^1Nikolai: ^7This one I know is not made in America.
hash_1e6cb15c961da9b8: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Comrades, I give you the Hellfire! Enjoy!
hash_1e6cb45c961daed1: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7You go to a better place now. Or worse place, I don't care -- just go!
hash_1e97cc4b4e4379cf: ^1Takeo: ^7Your name seems familiar, Lieutenant McCain. Ever been to a place called Shi No Numa?
hash_1e97cf4b4e437ee8: ^1Richtofen: ^7Fascinating. I take it you had access to our records before you became...this.
hash_1e97d14b4e43824e: ^1Nikolai: ^7You do? Because I do not recognize you.
hash_1e97d24b4e438401: ^1Dempsey: ^7Peter McCain, huh? I got sent to rescue you once. It didn't turn out so good.
hash_1eaa00aa6b976f6b: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Do not think me too drunk to notice your sarcasm, German. *Hic*    My brother from other mother knows what he is doing. As do I.
hash_1ebcab6083e4024b: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7After all this time, you people let the undead do this to me? I expect better!
hash_1ebcae6083e40764: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Soon, someone will come for Takeo. Good old "Tak." Surely, they miss me already.    Right? ...Someone? ...Anyone?
hash_1ebcb06083e40aca: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I don't plan on bein' down here long. Somebody gimme a hand!
hash_1ebcb16083e40c7d: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Somebody come give me medicine. And by medicine I mean vodka.
hash_1ecf10bdaf920b62: ^1Takeo: ^7Were you victim of surprise sneak attack?
hash_1ecf15bdaf9213e1: ^1Richtofen: ^7Did you always fall down this much, Dempsey?
hash_1edf36aa21396410: ^1Takeo: ^7The portal to the next world is open.
hash_1edf43aa21397a27: ^1Richtofen: ^7I do this in the name of science! No, seriously...
hash_1edf44aa21397bda: ^1Dempsey: ^7All that's missing is the jumper cables.
hash_1f3a69879e170232: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7That is longest time I have gone without vodka.
hash_1f3a6a879e1703e5: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Thanks, Tak -- just what the doctor ordered.
hash_1f493d22dcf2a01d: ^1Rushmore: ^7Voiceprint verified. Director Pernell? Is that you...?
hash_1f6f5f807a2484b7: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Over lips, past gums, look out stomach.
hash_1f6f60807a24866a: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I worry these potions are polluting my lymph nodes.
hash_1f7421c14684dd33: ^1Takeo: ^7Something has changed in you, Richtofen. You no longer have the fire in your eyes that I saw in the Castle, or even the island.
hash_1f8a9eaaed116af2: ^1Nikolai: ^7Sometimes old ways are best. Add electricity, even better.
hash_1f8aa1aaed11700b: ^1Takeo: ^7Better than breaking boards in karate class!
hash_1f9379d6eb44316b: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Your situation is not ideal, Richtofen.
hash_1f937ad6eb44331e: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I am not wishing your demise, but I have to consider it as possibl-ili-bility. <HIC!>
hash_1f937bd6eb4434d1: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Least I got front row seats.
hash_1f9c49852968e198: ^1Peter McCain: ^7So Tank -- I need to know one thing. Did we beat Group 935? Did we wipe their whole rotten operation off the face of the earth?
hash_1fa42df40a36da30: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Why do we fear dogs?  Oh, yes. The fucking teeth.

hash_1fc1e77c43d7b406: ^1Avogadro: ^7Any last words? Want to tell me about your imaginary ex-wives?
hash_1fd7bd26cbcd7856: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I'm not laughing at you Nikolai...     It's just a noisy smile.

hash_1fd7c226cbcd80d5: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7After such humiliation, you should try to restore your honor.
hash_1fefcd8087c7bac8: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Yo! I could use a shot in the arm over here!
hash_1fefce8087c7bc7b: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Bah! Somebody help me, and I will rise like Rasputin to fight again!
hash_1fefcf8087c7be2e: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I am lethally lacerated--! I cannot languish here laconically. I need help!

hash_2a557d193c34bd27: ^1Rushmore: ^7That item is locked inside the A.P.D., and you lack network permissions, credentials -- or even a decent story!    You'll have to win my trust. Find the access codes and bring them back to me.     Land of opportunity!
hash_2a933d62a2d5c678: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Comin' here was a bad idea. Trustin' that fruit-loop computer was a bad idea. Hell, bein' born was a bad idea!
hash_2a933e62a2d5c82b: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Is like horror movie, where hero knows not to go downstairs. So what do they do? They go downstairs!

hash_2b027fea37f63410: ^1Takeo: ^7Ah. I feel strength coursing through me.
hash_2b028cea37f64a27: ^1Richtofen: ^7Is that a hint of edelweiss I'm detecting?

hash_2b41568be11317e7: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Oh, I remember! You are talking about other Nikolai! One who rescued us from American base!

hash_2bdb130e27556dab: ^1Dempsey: ^7I don't need this. It's up for grabs.

hash_2ce3f68a26d3ff18: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7The son of the rising sun has...risen!
hash_2ce3f88a26d4027e: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Ya think I was pissed before? That was nothin'...

hash_2ce3fb8a26d40797: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7You know what I noticed while I was down there? Most of you need to trim your nosehair!
hash_2cf2e17851810fe4: ^1Dempsey: ^7These suckers are like sticking your thumb in a light socket.
hash_2cfd3084c0f3560f: ^1Dempsey: ^7I hope so, Takeo -- because you and I have got one major thing in common, and it's something we both ain't got!     OUR SOULS!

hash_2d126ba3d01ad294: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Arigato, Rushmore-san. You deserve a medal.
hash_2d126ea3d01ad7ad: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Better late than never. Though it was very long time.
hash_2d2745fb7cf20da7: ^1Dempsey: ^7Aw, crap... Still more stuff to fix.
hash_2d27fc639f812313: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7You're not very mature, are you, Dempsey? In fact, I would go as far as to say you are a little school boy trapped in an adult body...
hash_2d2b5f9fad808048: ^1Peter McCain: ^7This is Peter McCain. It worked. I'm in the Orb now -- I don't know how to explain how it feels, but it sure beats that A.D.A.M. Unit by a country mile.
hash_2d2cd4a05744b796: ^1Takeo: ^7I hope your plans include the preservation of our eternal souls, Nikolai.     Whatever may become of us ultimately, I would at least like to be at rest.
hash_2d322219d330d238: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7You will join your ancestors! Maybe sooner than later!
hash_2d322419d330d59e: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Hey Richtofen, did you just shit yourself?
hash_2d322519d330d751: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Before you die, German, I will drink to your health!

hash_2d5adae384c08652: ^1Takeo: ^7My companions do not truly understand duty. Not like you, monkey.

hash_2d65428c6ea9da1f: ^1Nikolai: ^7Is not "terrible" gun. Little bit "dinky," but not "terrible."

hash_2da4a2dc7fd37926: ^1Dempsey: ^7Holy shit! Check out the glow-worms up on the roof!
hash_2da4acdc7fd38a24: ^1Takeo: ^7Our enemies take position on the rooftops!

hash_2dd2775b2aa338db: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Aw, do I seriously have to go scroungin' bullets again?

hash_2dd27c5b2aa3415a: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Oh, splendid. I have nothing left to fire. This should go swimmingly...

hash_2ddc47aa7e79ff96: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Stay close, crawler. I am sure crazy computer will reward us both.
hash_2ddc48aa7e7a0149: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I'm baby-sittin' a giant maggot that smells like bad cabbage. *sighs* Where'd I go wrong?

hash_2e57296f5fcd0850: ^1Rushmore: ^7There's the first one! Two more to go.
hash_2e5a47e1c1d84366: ^1Takeo: ^7Now is a good time to make sure one's back is covered.
hash_2e8259546fc96654: ^1Nikolai: ^7I am right here, Dempsey. As I have told you several times -- we are here to find Elemental Shard.

hash_2e9df29d684c8db8: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Jolting Jacks. Watching from on high, hurling abuse down on everyone. You know, they're a lot like me.
hash_2e9df79d684c9637: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Jolting Jacks would make my body hair stand on end. If I had any.
hash_2e9df99d684c999d: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Whaddya get when you cross a maggotsack with a lightning rod?

hash_2eb1574debca3d93: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Wonder what happens when a Joltin' Jack gets wet? Zzzaaap!

hash_2ecc9b16749f2237: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7All demons report for duty! Right through here!
hash_2ecc9c16749f23ea: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I always wanted to see American fireworks. This will do...
hash_2ecc9d16749f259d: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7How do ya like your freakbag? Charred, or extra crispy...?

hash_2edffcc6f81cccf9: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7This is going to smell like bad yakitori...
hash_2edfffc6f81cd212: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Careful! That last step is a doozie!
hash_2ef174d7a53d8339: ^1Rushmore: ^7Oh, come on! Now you have to fetch it all over again.
hash_2f15bd2670a322bb: ^1Richtofen: ^7Feels like the Ragnarok is upping its power.
hash_2f23e93c6e4bc13c: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Someone really did slap the soul right outta ya, didn't they?
hash_2f23ea3c6e4bc2ef: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Hooray for Takeo! He is like firebirds who rise from their asses!
hash_2f460545b6b97579: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I'm a lover not a fighter.
hash_2f460745b6b978df: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Must be careful where I scratch when I wear this thing.

hash_2f68923330a20452: ^1Nikolai: ^7Come out, strange man. You must return stolen item!
hash_2f68933330a20605: ^1Dempsey: ^7I'm not here to hide. You've got stolen property. Give it back.
hash_2f68953330a2096b: ^1Takeo: ^7You sound like a reasonable man. Open the door before things get...unreasonable.
hash_2f73a42fe4208fa9: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7It's like watching the oven, waiting for the strudel to pop out.
hash_2f73a52fe420915c: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7If I shove a monkey-bomb in here, would it spit out a gorilla-bomb?
hash_2f73a62fe420930f: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Imagine if Red Army had machine like Punch-a-Pack.
hash_2f73a72fe42094c2: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Such a strange room down here. Is this a military base or what Dempsey would call a "bachelor pad"?
hash_2f7f29fe258d8440: ^1Richtofen: ^7Ach. These stinking bootlickers are such a pain!
hash_2f7f2bfe258d87a6: ^1Nikolai: ^7Well, at least they don't have far to fall when I kill them...
hash_2f7f2cfe258d8959: ^1Dempsey: ^7I've seen corpses bloat with gas before, but they usually stay put.
hash_2f7f36fe258d9a57: ^1Takeo: ^7These stink-demons are everywhere. What did these people serve in their cafeteria...?!
hash_2fa3f09f73bf523c: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to pickup a free Upgraded Weapon
hash_2fc9b69aa2e34070: ^1Dempsey: ^7Shoot. Gotta scare up some more ammo, pronto.
hash_2fed72552a94f96f: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Aw, yeah! Hellfire power is maxed out.
hash_2fed74552a94fcd5: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Hellfire is at top power level.

hash_300f18129a0787d4: ^1Nikolai: ^7If I can fix tank, I can fix this.
hash_300f19129a078987: ^1Dempsey: ^7Maybe a gopher jammed in a vent somewhere...

hash_3055075c9554bab7: ^1Marlton: ^7Oh! You mean to say you're not familiar with the A.D.A.M. Initiative? The home Service Robot meant to cater to its owner's every need? It was supposed to revolutionize the world!    Except, there was a problem.  According to various Internet forums I subscribe to, the robots began experiencing emotions!     This became exponentially more problematic when Project Toy Soldier was started. They turned their robots into killer-soldiers, but the robots did not wish to die!     But that was only the start of where it all went wrong!
hash_306ee345f209cbb0: ^1Takeo: ^7I will guard it with my life. Now tell me why I am doing this...?
hash_306ef045f209e1c7: ^1Richtofen: ^7Care to explain why we need this thing?
hash_306ef145f209e37a: ^1Dempsey: ^7So what exactly is this thing supposed to do?
hash_3079381eb29462db: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7You answered the crawl of duty, and you paid the price.
hash_30793b1eb29467f4: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7You were in violation of the chemical weapons ban.
hash_307f52fddd8d0112: ^1Dempsey: ^7What's in this? Novocaine? Cocaine? Lidocaine? Some sort of caine...
hash_3081a4d0d2ea2e38: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Who'll take this off my hands?
hash_3081a5d0d2ea2feb: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Wife Number Three said I do not share. Wife Three, are you watching?
hash_3081a6d0d2ea319e: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I must politely decline. Please take it, my friends.
hash_3082b08811c4c6a2: ^1Avogadro: ^7Tank Dempsey. I used to actually admire you, back when I was human.
hash_3089449c8b1b72f8: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7How dare you lay hands on a soldier of the Emperor!!
hash_3089469c8b1b765e: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Hnh. Pretty solid punch for a freakbag...
hash_3089479c8b1b7811: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Go eat Dempsey. I hear he is made of hot dogs!
hash_3089499c8b1b7b77: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Ah, well, another scar for the collection.
hash_308f6bcff0f9169c: ^1Richtofen: ^7These are a good fit for my soft, sensitive, surgeon's hands.
hash_308f6dcff0f91a02: ^1Nikolai: ^7Feels like little toy gun, but I am not here to play.
hash_308f6ecff0f91bb5: ^1Dempsey: ^7Speed and precision in one tidy package.
hash_30a04dfba33bee49: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Oh, I bet I could squeeze in next to you. Why don't you open the door and find out?
hash_30a04efba33beffc: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I don't recognize the voice, but the word "pencil-neck" automatically comes to mind...
hash_30a04ffba33bf1af: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7This is Nikolai Belinski. I am tourist -- made wrong turn in Albuquerque. Please help with directions?
hash_30a050fba33bf362: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7This is no time to hide like a coward. Come out and give me the stolen canister!
hash_30a2789aa5d9f560: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7You didn't even see me coming!     Not like that time my mom... er...never mind.
hash_30a2799aa5d9f713: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I am very good sniper. Much too good for you!
hash_30a27a9aa5d9f8c6: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7See how the spirits guide my bullet...
hash_30a27f9aa5da0145: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Maybe you can borrow a head from one of your friends?
hash_30ae7a6db1e53383: ^1Takeo: ^7If this gas is meant to sap our strength, I believe it is working...
hash_30ae856db1e54634: ^1Richtofen: ^7Try not to breathe this stuff. Doctor's orders. Seriously. It's bad.
hash_30ae886db1e54b4d: ^1Dempsey: ^7Smells like weed-*coughs*     Weed-killer. Smells like weed-killer down here.
hash_30b3e03bfd1237b1: ïŋ―%m/ïŋ―rQïŋ―ïŋ―I{ïŋ―Jïŋ―1ïŋ―Aïŋ―ÛŠïŋ―1 ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―Ã°ïŋ―Ũïŋ―.Yïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ― deep down, I kinda hoped 'my' Richtofen was actually trying NOT to be a bad guy.

hash_30fce84606a71620: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Important thing is we all learned a valuable lesson here.
hash_30fce94606a717d3: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Let's celebrate with a drink! Do you have any?
hash_30fcea4606a71986: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I will return favor, Richtofen -- one day.
hash_3108c2b89256f854: ^1Peter McCain: ^7You sure you want me to do that, Tank? We go way back. I could embarrass the heck out of you if I wanted to.
hash_31098e2b32f19894: ^1Dempsey: ^7Ain't getting any disagreement from me, Tak. Reckon this whole thing's a front for something else...and I'm betting it ain't a cathouse.
hash_3126d99bbac5e188: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Whole place is choking on filth of its own creation.
hash_3126db9bbac5e4ee: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Why do I think I'm gonna need a plunger before this is over...?
hash_3126dc9bbac5e6a1: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7If base cannot breathe, we must find way to blow her nose.
hash_3126de9bbac5ea07: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Come on, America. I am yearning to breathe free!
hash_3143dec08e8cc45b: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I see the great Russian advance has failed to materialize.
hash_3143e1c08e8cc974: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Hurry, Nikolai -- it is time for flight or flee!
hash_3143e3c08e8cccda: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Judgin' by all the freakbags around you, I think you goofed, Tak.
hash_3163754621cfb383: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I remember first time I got too drunk. I soiled diaper.
hash_3163764621cfb536: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I do not feel duty-bound to help you. It is my choice.
hash_31637b4621cfbdb5: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I probably shouldn't be doing this without gloves...
hash_316aaf227f919653: ^1Takeo: ^7Shield broke. I must be more careful.
hash_316aba227f91a904: ^1Richtofen: ^7Not a good time to loose my shield. Never a good time...
hash_317d5f1d70a32a93: ^1Nikolai: ^7However much you make light of situation, Dempsey, I know that you know that we have to follow this path.
hash_31895f0df7027e50: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I can feel it throbbing in my hand every time it shoots!
hash_3189640df70286cf: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I take considerable delight from your particularly painful demise.
hash_3189650df7028882: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Mark II makes it easy to hit target -- even when drunk!
hash_3189660df7028a35: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I am not here to mess around!
hash_3196845cb0dd1f60: ^1Richtofen: ^7Diagnosis: I am fucking dying down here.
hash_3196865cb0dd22c6: ^1Nikolai: ^7Dammit, Nikolai, pay attention. You cannot lead if you are dead.
hash_3196875cb0dd2479: ^1Dempsey: ^7Aw, son of a bitch! I am letting down the cause here...
hash_3196915cb0dd3577: ^1Takeo: ^7Apologies, my friends, but I need your assistance quickly!
hash_31bb5455773e29a6: ^1Avogadro: ^7Stop this.  You do not understand what will happen should you do this.
hash_31c0d1ba06a29f33: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7It's true, you know -- I'm a lover, not a fighter.
hash_31c0d4ba06a2a44c: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Gyah! Stop it! My ancestors might be watching!
hash_31c0d6ba06a2a7b2: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Oh, I'm payin' that back with interest!
hash_31c0d7ba06a2a965: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7OW! But Nikolai was told Yankees are very weak!
hash_31c5f7d03498779b: ^1Nikolai: ^7Matter transference. Hrrh. Best not to think too much about it.
hash_31ce70964ecbcad4: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Hello, A.D.A.M. Pleased to make your aquaintance.
hash_31ce72964ecbce3a: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Where's the ignition on this thing?
hash_31ecc90bdebddbb3: ^1Dempsey: ^7Sergeant A.D.A.M., you are a credit to your country!
hash_31ecca0bdebddd66: ^1Richtofen: ^7You know, I think Sergeant A.D.A.M. Is pretty good at this.
hash_32060ccc8a1ca4f0: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7If at first I don't succeed...
hash_320612cc8a1caf22: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7And I had such high hopes...
hash_323539d00e6e05cb: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7It's true: red mist can be beautiful!
hash_32353ed00e6e0e4a: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Mess with Tank Dempsey and that's whatcha get!
hash_32353fd00e6e0ffd: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I would drink toast to this weapon, if I were not already drunk!
hash_323b4bc2425efb60: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I must be getting slow and weak in my old age.
hash_323b4cc2425efd13: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7So ya knocked me down. Big fuckin' deal.
hash_323b4ec2425f0079: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I will rise again and have my vengeance!     Just as soon as someone gives me my medicine.
hash_323b51c2425f0592: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Oh, it's filthy down here. My uniform will never look the same...
hash_323fa4db929fdc75: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Must be fun not to feel like the only samurai in town, right, Takeo?
hash_3246fb6a8febd9fc: ^1Takeo: ^7You are too impatient, my friend. You should show more..."patience."
hash_3247026a8febe5e1: ^1Nikolai: ^7Maybe mission is too dangerous for you, Dempsey.
hash_3255be2fcb2f6b9f: ^1Computer System: ^7Loading Ray Gun Mark II Program Access Code. Charge Required.
hash_32754667ceebbf09: ^1Avogadro: ^7You are a pawn in a battle you do not understand, Takeo. You will die without honor.
hash_3292365fee89f566: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Finally. I was considering performing the procedure myself.
hash_3292395fee89fa7f: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I was gonna give you an "Ooh-Ra," but you can settle for an..."Oh, Yeah."
hash_32923b5fee89fde5: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I am very grateful for this fortuitous intervention!
hash_3296fbef09bdedf0: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7What I'm trying to say is that we've ALL made mistakes, so let's forgive and forget.     Wouldn't that be sweet?
hash_32ac3aa31ad1e5b8: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Did anyone call for a "surgical strike"? HA HA HA!
hash_32ac3fa31ad1ee37: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7You honor me, Box. Perhaps honor me to death...
hash_32ac40a31ad1efea: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Only thing worse than sniper is drunk sniper.
hash_32ac41a31ad1f19d: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Good for bustin' skulls at a distance. Up close? Not so much.
hash_32ca9809b7403228: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Trespassers will be shot. I promise I'll try not to hit the canister.
hash_32ca9909b74033db: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7We should hurry, before other intruder becomes lunch for hell-pigs.
hash_32ca9a09b740358e: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7There is no honor among thieves. Truly.
hash_32ca9f09b7403e0d: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7A stolen canister of one-one-five. What could possibly go wrong? EVERYTHING!!!!
hash_32ceeaffefb302b0: ^1Takeo: ^7You know exactly what you are good at, don't you, Dempsey?
hash_32cef7ffefb318c7: ^1Richtofen: ^7Well aimed, Dempsey! I think you even hit a specific pimple!
hash_32cef9ffefb31c2d: ^1Nikolai: ^7You are good soldier, Dempsey.     However simple minded.
hash_32d113805ef44b5e: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Hey, Nikolai! Have you tried that on yourself?
hash_32d118805ef453dd: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Your aim is true, Nikolai...or merely lucky?
hash_32ea7e9ce91283f3: ^1Rushmore: ^7Be advised: there are four possible prototypes of the Ray Gun Mark II that you can construct.     The plans are classified, but if you're ingenious enough to discover the steps yourself, I will consider your security clearance granted.
hash_32edb488ea27916c: ^1Avogadro: ^7All you will achieve, is to hasten your own demise!
hash_32f86b2705b51504: ^1Marlton: ^7Oh, ho-no! I know what a human door-knock sounds like and YOU, sir, are not of the human door-knocking variety!
hash_32f87c93ff561ad3: ^1Richtofen: ^7Just so you know -- Russian meat isn't tender. It's quite...leathery.
hash_32fa112e9fe55d3f: All players must be present to overload A.D.A.M.

hash_33154af4da82a32e: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7This will register an 8.6 on the Richtofen SATISFACTION Scale.
hash_33154cf4da82a694: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I am like walking tank with this thing.     Move over, Dempsey...?
hash_33154df4da82a847: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Every time I see one of these, a little part of me stands up and salutes.
hash_33154ff4da82abad: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7"L.M.G." What does the L stand for? Long? Lethal? Ludicrous?
hash_33445c42bb5e3ec2: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I have vodka. You do not even have head!
hash_33445d42bb5e4075: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Wanna go again? Didn't think so, worm-brain!
hash_334b4b1630be3dff: ^1Richtofen: ^7I am -- how would Dempsey put it? -- "mowing them down."
hash_334b4c1630be3fb2: ^1Dempsey: ^7Don't you get it? This comes easy to me.
hash_334b4e1630be4318: ^1Takeo: ^7There will be little lament for your demise.
hash_3356bb075ac2cbc8: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7What was this place like before the demons came? I suspect it was even worse.
hash_3356bd075ac2cf2e: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Two Nikolais, two Taks, two Sauerkrauts...I'm gettin' too old for this shit.
hash_3356be075ac2d0e1: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Give gun, get back better gun. Is American way!
hash_3356c0075ac2d447: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I still cannot believe I am taking orders from Nikolai-dummkopf-Belinski...
hash_33685bf01251be48: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Ya like that, slackjaws? I'll be servin' up more in a minute.
hash_33685cf01251bffb: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7A few of these in Stalingrad, and we could have retaken city in days.
hash_33685df01251c1ae: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7There is no subtlety to this weapon. But this is not a time for subtlety.
hash_336862f01251ca2d: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Ha! My teeth are still shaking...and yours are all gone!
hash_337735e60ec1b4b0: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Am I leakin' ammo, or does it just run out that fast?
hash_337736e60ec1b663: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Empty gun is no gun at all!
hash_337737e60ec1b816: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7My ammunition is expended. What now?
hash_33773ce60ec1c095: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Bullets, why have you abandoned me?
hash_337be80a16220277: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I am ready to go full Ragnarok with my DG5.
hash_338b475b1132e832: ^1Rushmore: ^7Excellent! Now, be careful with that head.
hash_338d9d70fa23483f: ^1Richtofen: ^7I think you stretched this out a bit, Rushmore -- just to feel like you have friends.
hash_338da070fa234d58: ^1Takeo: ^7So there are five. Like The Book Of Five Rings, except...stupider.
hash_33a938bfe2a74ce1: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I don't know how shit got this messed up, but can anyone tell me why we're takin' orders from a damn Commie?!

hash_33d10eccbe9e868c: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Hey, Takeo, you are very good at shooting. We will be friends, da?
hash_33d10fccbe9e883f: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Atta boy, Tak! Let's see three more just like it!

hash_34f850a73d96a52f: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7With this, I will finally win my colleagues' respect!    Hope? You are all I have...

hash_3a713b93ddbd7ce7: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Can't ever drop your guard, Nikolai. You should know that.

hash_3a797ebf63eefc3d: ^1Takeo: ^7This blade and I are one! You and your heads...are not.
hash_3a8f351657113306: ^1Takeo: ^7Surely by now I have proven my intentions are...honorable?

hash_3a8f42165711491d: ^1Richtofen: ^7And what will you give me in return, hm?
hash_3abe8a47b5e47ae0: ^1Avogadro: ^7You are only prolonging your own demise!

hash_3e3f29e0f8e5fc9b: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I'm a little worried about how light this gun is getting.

hash_3e4bbe4b700f6e47: ^1Richtofen: ^7You don't look very commanding on the floor, Nikolai!
hash_3e4bbf4b700f6ffa: ^1Dempsey: ^7Come on, Nik -- you're better than this. Aren't you?
hash_3e59f4d2bf334476: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7As always, it's a matter of "filthy lucre."     I love that term. And why do you never hear about the clean lucre?
hash_3e59f6d2bf3347dc: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Hm. I should not have spent so much in gift shop.
hash_3e59f7d2bf33498f: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Hey, how much ya think a Marine gets paid, anyway?
hash_3e59f9d2bf334cf5: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I burn with shame whenever I lack funds. Ancestors forgive me.
hash_3e65821ad0ec8bcb: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Very funny, Box. Why not just poke me in eye?
hash_3e7926da67ce536e: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I would have made your death more agonizing, but I'm a bit tight on time.
hash_3e7928da67ce56d4: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I open your head -- like bottle!
hash_3e7929da67ce5887: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7You can keep the bullet -- and shove it where the sun don't shine.
hash_3e792bda67ce5bed: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I hope that puts your plans to kill Takeo to rest.
hash_3e7d4adbaee82fd6: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I hate you. My children hate you. Everyone hates you, Dempsey.     ESPECIALLY ME!
hash_3e7d4cdbaee8333c: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I see what you did there, Dempsey!
hash_3e7d4fdbaee83855: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Your bullet found righteous target.     Nose of Demon.
hash_3e8d2e4123be9478: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7This better be lethal -- don't want any bits left over.
hash_3e8d2f4123be962b: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I hope this does not go wrong and accidentally kill me. That would be terrible!
hash_3e8d304123be97de: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7There can be no escape, Hellspawn!
hash_3e8d354123bea05d: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I wonder if they'll suffer? I do hope so -- it makes it so much more fun for me!
hash_3ea64c07741cb67f: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7The spirits aid you in your endeavor...
hash_3ea64d07741cb832: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Richtofen -- do all German doctors inflict pain?
hash_3ea64e07741cb9e5: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I'll say one thing, Other Richtofen -- you're a little bit less crazy than mine.
hash_3ebb31ec5c568d05: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I do hope they've done some devious experiments around here. I do love experiments. Especially devious ones.     But only when I am the Doctor.

hash_3ee23139e46718b0: ^1Takeo: ^7I could consider this a breach of contract.
hash_3ee23e39e4672ec7: ^1Richtofen: ^7However much I tire of this juvenile prank, Box. It's clear that you do not.
hash_3ee23f39e467307a: ^1Dempsey: ^7Take the money and run. Every. Fucking. Time.
hash_3ee24039e467322d: ^1Nikolai: ^7Box, you are like Politburo: promising much, delivering nothing.
hash_3efd8e322f2872df: ^1Takeo: ^7It is only your pride that is wounded.
hash_3efd91322f2877f8: ^1Richtofen: ^7I wish I'd seen what happened. I'm sure it was hilarious.
hash_3f0c00684b18d1df: ^1Dempsey: ^7Whatever you're thinking of doing, Richtofen, don't do it!

hash_3f27c1986f08d7f3: ^1Takeo: ^7So many bullets. It hardly seems fair.
hash_3f27cf986f08efbd: ^1Dempsey: ^7Oh, yeah! Overkill is my middle name!
hash_3f285fe9a5797220: ^1Takeo: ^7Gas is a cruel weapon. Shame on you, America.
hash_3f286ce9a5798837: ^1Richtofen: ^7*coughs* Surely, there is an exhaust fan down here somewhere...
hash_3f286de9a57989ea: ^1Dempsey: ^7*gags* Can't stay down here long if we don't clear the air.
hash_3f286ee9a5798b9d: ^1Nikolai: ^7*coughs* Have to clear air down here.
hash_3f315c7192897136: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Hm. It is powerful, but I really haven't got all day to line up a shot.
hash_3f315e719289749c: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Bang. Ch-chk. Bang. Ch-chk. Bang. Ch-chk. *sigh*
hash_3f315f719289764f: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Oh, that's perfect! For deer huntin'.
hash_3f316171928979b5: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7My cousin was a sniper in Saipan.     Well, my late cousin...
hash_3f6a672efb62257c: ^1Dempsey: ^7It's that time again, monkey. Put on your game face...
hash_3f6a6a2efb622a95: ^1Richtofen: ^7Congratulations, monkey. You are now the second-smartest member of this squad.
hash_3f6a6d2efb622fae: ^1Takeo: ^7Monkey-san! Let us go bring honor to the Empire.
hash_3f8188f5fcbbd880: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Verrukt. That's where I know your name from. I went there to rescue you, but you were already gone.
hash_3f8189f5fcbbda33: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7How do you know me? Were we drinking buddies once? My memory is not what it was.
hash_3f818af5fcbbdbe6: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7What did you look like before landing inside this android?
hash_3f818ff5fcbbe465: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Have our paths crossed? Or did you meet some of my former associates at Group 935?
hash_3f9de757e38346b8: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7You seein' this?! I'm a human wreckin' ball!
hash_3f9de857e383486b: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Feel the fiery blast of my ray gun!
hash_3f9dee57e383529d: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I'm not feeling very merciful today.
hash_3fa49735757b991c: ^1Nikolai: ^7Didn't expect me to do that, did you?
hash_3fa49835757b9acf: ^1Dempsey: ^7Bet you didn't even feel it going in!
hash_3fa49e35757ba501: ^1Takeo: ^7I trust I have made my point?
hash_3fb0eaa171d9228d: ^1Rushmore: ^7Come on, friend. Get the Orb there in one piece.
hash_3fdf722deeca45bd: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I will not mention any losings.
hash_401d5f4e155779fb: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7What? It's for the war effort!
hash_401d644e1557827a: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Oh, look, I found a prize.
hash_40313ac7b080c1eb: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I do wish I had time to assess your wounds, but I have to cause more.
hash_40313dc7b080c704: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7This is how a Samurai faces his enemy -- without fear!
hash_403140c7b080cc1d: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7You will not be alone in your graves!
hash_4035b3144b4dc2e4: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I am a little reluctant. Witnessing the destruction of the Earth has left me wary of such endeavors.
hash_404ebf586e2b7e8b: ^1Avogadro: ^7Your persistence does not make your actions any less futile!
hash_405f1aaacdea85e0: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Don't you know who I am??!
hash_405f1faacdea8e5f: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I do not like being surrounded.
hash_405f20aacdea9012: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7This is bad day for Nikolai.
hash_405f21aacdea91c5: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7You sure you wanna do this, puss buckets?!

hash_4081cffafbfb7997: ^1Nikolai: ^7You led your compatriots on a journey as destructive and insane as one our own Richtofen took us on...      Now, things must change.
hash_40b48f718a9c1c7e: ^1Rushmore: ^7Yes, Director Pernell is missing. As are the rest of the Broken Arrow staff.     Whatever happened shut me down. I can't remember the incident itself. Some sort of recording error...
hash_40c4462485cd3f52: ^1Rushmore: ^7Warning: authorization window expires in one minute.
hash_40cbce683297470f: ^1Richtofen: ^7Hope you enjoyed your triple laser bypass!
hash_40cbcf68329748c2: ^1Dempsey: ^7I'm packing some major heat right now.
hash_40cbd16832974c28: ^1Takeo: ^7The energy bursts forth, eager to find its mark!
hash_40ece447f810c4ab: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7There is little honor in killing canines. And less honor in getting killed by them.
hash_40ece547f810c65e: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Dog is dead, but still I hear growling.    *burps* Mystery solved.
hash_40ece647f810c811: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7That's right, dog: you got boned!
hash_40fb3e7ef1f3bca0: ^1Dempsey: ^7Meatheads are so dumb I don't even have to put down bait!
hash_40fb417ef1f3c1b9: ^1Richtofen: ^7I only like traps when I'm the one doing the trapping.
hash_40fb4c7ef1f3d46a: ^1Takeo: ^7Haha...I should not laugh, but this is very sneaky!
hash_410bcc852b683ee8: ^1Avogadro: ^7Haha. You should know -- I will rise again.

hash_41427102792ec101: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7In the name of the Emperor, stand and fight.

hash_4162360c187e15c6: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7You like bullet in face? No? Fuck you -- I like bullet in face!

hash_4168d9344f31822d: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7You really have done well for yourself, my Russian friend. So much better than the bloated buffoon I know as Nikolai.

hash_417d2656a7a5ea68: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Not a good time to have a pocket full of beef jerky...
hash_417d2b56a7a5f2e7: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7No offense, Dempsey, but I do not like the dogs in America.
hash_417d2c56a7a5f49a: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I will just be over here killing electrical dogs if anyone needs me...!
hash_41824bb676b40462: ^1Rushmore: ^7No more jokes, pal. Haven't you got some actual work to do?
hash_4190b85f1b4898d8: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7You are a master of the bait-und-switch. Hmm... "master-bait-und-switch"?     DO I HAVE TO SPELL IT OUT?!
hash_4190bd5f1b48a157: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7You bring shame and disgrace on honorable boxes everywhere!
hash_4190be5f1b48a30a: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Always running out. Like ex-wives. No goodbye kiss for Nikolai.
hash_4190bf5f1b48a4bd: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Fool me once, shame on you. Fool me twice...    Just gimme a fuckin' gun!
hash_41932a9d26604778: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7If you die, Takeo, can I do the autopsy?
hash_4193309d266051aa: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Make Sushi while the sun rains hay, Takeo! Is old proverb!
hash_4193319d2660535d: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Do it, Tak -- shut 'em up for good.
hash_41b4a642ec1e6ae0: ^1Richtofen: ^7Really? You're just going to throw bodies at the problem?
hash_41b4a842ec1e6e46: ^1Nikolai: ^7Are you trying to surround me? Good job, if so.
hash_41b4a942ec1e6ff9: ^1Dempsey: ^7Just hang tight, freak-bags -- I'll get to you all in my own time.
hash_41fe4e7cd7b6b120: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I ain't even wasting bullets on ya -- only energy!
hash_41fe4f7cd7b6b2d3: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7This is very dangerous weapon! Especially when I'm using it!
hash_41fe507cd7b6b486: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Feel my laser! Not once, not twice, but THRICE!
hash_41fe557cd7b6bd05: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7It could have been so much worse, believe me!
hash_42022c61e3f060cf: ^1Marlton: ^7You're in a battle of wits with an actual, inanimate, door! How have you possibly survived this long?
hash_420aabe3533615ef:
ïŋ―um/ïŋ―ïŋ―JUQNïŋ―ïŋ―[ïŋ―ïŋ―
OWïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―Y ïŋ―ïŋ―^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Bravo, Sergeant A.D.A.M.! Do it again!
hash_420db1aa7312b0d9: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7When this is over, I am oiling your pistons. I promise!
hash_420db2aa7312b28c: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7So you're a medic, too, huh? Well, nobody likes a show-off...
hash_420db3aa7312b43f: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Such good robot! Can I keep?
hash_420db4aa7312b5f2: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Amazing. You save life almost as well as you take it.

hash_4253a0d3638a2a86: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I've been mortally wounded before. It's no fun.
hash_4253a2d3638a2dec: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7You risk everything for me?! Thank you, my Japanese friend!
hash_4253a3d3638a2f9f: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Sometimes, Tak, you really surprise me.
hash_4262549fc3334712: :ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―4Fïŋ―ïŋ―P~;#hïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―Ûïŋ―8ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―oïŋ―34ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―`(ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―Ûŧ*'s could spell. It feels very much like double jeopardy.
hash_4262cbd0b838cb19: ^1Rushmore: ^7You have to move faster! Go back and try again.
hash_427b4220cafc8551: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I wonder if crawling everywhere on all fours builds up that static charge?
hash_427b4320cafc8704: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Well, this is a shockin' development...
hash_427b4420cafc88b7: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7They crawl on ground, they crawl on rooftop -- just like reindeer!
hash_427b4520cafc8a6a: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I do not like America. Too many crawlers.
hash_427ebfa1e9a34340: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7To leave the battlefield before the war is over would be most...dishonorable.
hash_428a1189f6f03481: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I -- I mean we -- don't have time for this. Just tell me where the Elemental Shard is hidden.
hash_428a1289f6f03634: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Buddy, I bleed red, white and blue. Now point me toward the Elemental Shard.
hash_428a1389f6f037e7: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Sergeant Nikolai Belinski, Red Army. *burps* Where is Elemental Shard?
hash_428a1489f6f0399a: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I am not your enemy. All that matters is locating the Elemental Shard.
hash_42a65ed9cf839028: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7All right, fart blossoms! Time for me to burst yer bubbles.
hash_42a65fd9cf8391db: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I have crawled like you before. And then I sober up.    Kidding. I never sober up.
hash_42a660d9cf83938e: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Silent but deadly.     Actually, not so silent.
hash_42a665d9cf839c0d: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Nova Six Crawlers. Among the foulest of creatures ever to stalk us...
hash_42b52ac8fdd26029: ^1Takeo: ^7I will strike like a divine wind.
hash_42b533c8fdd26f74: ^1Nikolai: ^7I do not know if Nevada has suffered earthquakes. But it will, soon.
hash_42b534c8fdd27127: ^1Dempsey: ^7Uncle Sam better not bill me for the mess.
hash_42b535c8fdd272da: ^1Richtofen: ^7That feeling when you need a scalpel, but you get a chainsaw...
hash_42eb40865b446c5f: ^1Takeo: ^7A minor setback, I am sure. *sigh* One of many.
hash_42eb43865b447178: ^1Richtofen: ^7I've been meaning to ask: were you dropped on your head as a child?
hash_42eb45865b4474de: ^1Nikolai: ^7Pick up your weapon and return to battle!
hash_42f667732cd60d6c: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I will catch fart in bottle. Analyze that. Is same thing.
hash_42f668732cd60f1f: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7So I gotta round up a fart-blossom? Beats diggin' latrines, I guess.
hash_42f66a732cd61285: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Some science should not be pursued. The kind of science that pursues you.
hash_433bc59733d74ccb: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I know how you feel. It's horrible being undead.
hash_433bc89733d751e4: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I remain humble. Even in defeat of face.
hash_433bca9733d7554a: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Ya'll picked on the wrong marine.
hash_433bcb9733d756fd: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7My name is Nikolai Belinski. I am very tough guy.     You will see!
hash_4352e72c29e82d91: ^1Rushmore: ^7I have been testing them on our core values, Deputy Director. I had to make sure they could be trusted.
hash_43659af2c37120d9: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7These walkin' lightbulbs go straight to the top of my hit-list.
hash_436a1d40f5d493e0: ^1Rushmore: ^7Another joke? Sure. Sure. President Johnson calls the Kremlin, but they tell him they can't talk because the Kremlin's on fire.    So Johnson calls right back, and again they tell him the Kremlin's on fire and hang up.    The third time he calls, they say, "Mr. President, why do you keep calling? The Kremlin is on fire!" LBJ says, "I know, I just like to hear you say it!"
hash_436b8daaf42ee683: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I think you're trying too hard, Nik. Ain't no one around here expecting you to do anything other than fall on your drunk ass.
hash_437de30b8866ddfe: ^1Rushmore: ^7Second chance, Intruder. Do it right this time.
hash_4394f56e5e843753: ^1Takeo: ^7I wonder how long before they invent "ballistic katana"?
hash_4395006e5e844a04: ^1Richtofen: ^7"Ballistic knife," eh? Someone had way too much time on their hands...
hash_4395026e5e844d6a: ^1Nikolai: ^7Do not use to open can. I have made this mistake before.
hash_43962769b5f85193: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7HA HA HA! That is so funny! Why is no one else laughing? HA HA HA!
hash_43962869b5f85346: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Tragedy strikes -- my monkey is lost!
hash_43962d69b5f85bc5: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I find monkeys annoying. I spank them every chance I get.

hash_43e3e3a458d9c24a: ^1Takeo: ^7I am starting to wish I had more bullets.
hash_441a9760c1d8dbba: ^1Dempsey: ^7Just because your better self knows what he's doing doesn't mean you do...     In fact, there are probably rocks around here with a better grasp of our goals.
hash_4425f4a93daad76c: ^1Takeo: ^7I see why the Hellfire is Nikolai's favorite.
hash_4425f9a93daadfeb: ^1Richtofen: ^7I try to act mature. Und then I do something like that and I am a kid all over again!
hash_4425faa93daae19e: ^1Dempsey: ^7What'd I kill there? A baker's dozen...?
hash_4426a8c2dd2f2146: ^1Richtofen: ^7I've thought of a great new name for you, Drunk Nikolai!     Drunk-olai!
hash_4426b5c2dd2f375d: ^1Takeo: ^7I would be more impressed, Nikolai, if I thought you did that...     Deliberately.
hash_442e0a7b73b70ad9: ^1Takeo: ^7Was this part of your plan, Nikolai?
hash_442e147b73b71bd7: ^1Dempsey: ^7Just because you got a plan don't mean you can't ask for help, Nikolai!
hash_442e157b73b71d8a: ^1Richtofen: ^7Leave Nikolai alone! He's very important, don't you know...
hash_4434f9b6e6a148a3: ^1Richtofen: ^7Honestly, Dempsey, I don't know if you're going to survive this!
hash_443504b6e6a15b54: ^1Takeo: ^7Do you need help, Dempsey? You look like you need help.
hash_4459475deae57700: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7In for a penny, in for a pound.     Get it? Pound?
hash_44594c5deae57f7f: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7You did not expect that from me, did you?
hash_44594d5deae58132: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Huh. My bones are still vibrating.
hash_445b29a46c737225: ^1Avogadro: ^7You should have done more, Richtofen -- So much more.
hash_446c5e5dcc6c6bd8: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Richtofen is indeed a doctor. A doctor of death.
hash_446c605dcc6c6f3e: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Nice shot, Richtofen. Maybe try doin' the same to your own head sometime!
hash_446c615dcc6c70f1: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I will drink to your victories, Richtofen!     However minor they may be.
hash_446ee7b737bb0548: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I'm ready to deliver a beat-down. Who's up first?!
hash_446ee8b737bb06fb: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I have seen your kind before...vodka stealers!
hash_446ee9b737bb08ae: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I will not yield. Not even a little.
hash_446eeeb737bb112d: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Just so you know. If you try to swallow me, you will choke.

hash_452ac1157e14e0e0: ^1Richtofen: ^7It's going to smell pretty bad in here before long. Worse even than wet dog.
hash_452ac4157e14e5f9: ^1Dempsey: ^7Stand back. This thing heats up in a hurry.
hash_452ace157e14f6f7: ^1Takeo: ^7Come, demons -- the gate back to Hell is open!
hash_455b337f3dfd26d3: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Fat lot of good this weapon is doing me with NO BULLETS!!
hash_455b367f3dfd2bec: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Without bullets, I am as useless as this weapon.
hash_455b387f3dfd2f52: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I love guns. I just hate havin' to refill 'em.
hash_455b397f3dfd3105: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Bullets are like wives -- always leaving me.
hash_4569f5f5556d3209: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7People are either useful, or they are not.    I guess the same can be said of these shambling monstrosities...
hash_4569f6f5556d33bc: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7That ain't funny, Rushmore. Unless you weren't tryin' to be funny...
hash_4569f7f5556d356f: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7As usual, we must figure out rules for ourselves.
hash_4569f8f5556d3722: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I do not understand. Was that a serious suggestion? Artificial intelligence, artificial humor.
hash_4573ccd93bfe3893: ^1Richtofen: ^7This almost takes the fun out of stabbing!
hash_4573cdd93bfe3a46: ^1Dempsey: ^7Surprised you're not squealin' like a stuck pig!
hash_4573ced93bfe3bf9: ^1Nikolai: ^7You feel sharp pain? Don't worry, is probably nothing.
hash_4573d7d93bfe4b44: ^1Takeo: ^7"Ballistic" is a strange word. I would call it "fatalistic."
hash_457bb9ea722136e6: ^1Takeo: ^7Thank you, Russian. Clearly you care more for me than you do yourself.
hash_457bc6ea72214cfd: ^1Richtofen: ^7I fear...I fear I may have become intoxicated...simply by our close proximity!
hash_458369dd30d8717d: ^1Nikolai: ^7Do not mock me, Richtofen. You of all people should understand gravity of situation...and what is at stake.
hash_45ae5826e2252115: ^1Richtofen: ^7Not quite what I was going for.
hash_45b3db31cce90093: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I don't know why they call this thing "overkill." I'd say it's just-right-kill.
hash_45b3dd31cce903f9: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7There will be no open-casket funerals for you.
hash_45b3e031cce90912: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Sometimes I don't know how I manage to hang onto this beast!

hash_46053795219144d1: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Someone come help me find my contact lens? And maybe re-start my heart...?
hash_4605389521914684: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Anyone not named Richtofen: get over here and get me off my ass!
hash_4605399521914837: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Will somebody com-*BURPS*    Ah. Better. Will somebody come help me up?!
hash_46053a95219149ea: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7The Emperor would not approve of his soldier begging to be revived.    Emperor, avert your ears...
hash_460f70b1fccf9ce0: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7We may fight together, but we are no team, Richtofen.     You betray us far too...frequently.
hash_4610651f2d85c5b0: ^1Richtofen: ^7Low ammo? I really should plan ahead better...
hash_4610671f2d85c916: ^1Nikolai: ^7Low ammo? I did not need Kronorium to see that coming.
hash_4610681f2d85cac9: ^1Dempsey: ^7Low on ammo. Story of my life.
hash_461f9937e0db103f: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7We wiped a lot of things off the face of the earth...    It's complicated.
hash_4626644d62de0b21: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I think I started drinking to forget...     Though I do not remember why.
hash_46787d812da0d37f: ^1Rushmore: ^7Well done! You used the telepads to "prevail over the impossible"!
hash_46898a267d81dd51: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I should have my head examined if I dare take on the horde with only one of these.
hash_46898b267d81df04: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7The right tool for the job this ain't.
hash_46898c267d81e0b7: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Hell-pigs are ugly enough without seeing close up in scope-hole.
hash_46898d267d81e26a: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Such a long rifle. So very, very long.

hash_4d5248310207e8d3: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Say my name!    It is Takeo Masaki.
hash_4d524a310207ec39: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I like to picture Richtofen's face when I take a swing.
hash_4d524b310207edec: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Stay down. Ja, just like that.
hash_4d657ed7449058b8: ^1Avogadro: ^7I will no longer allow you escape with you lives.
hash_4d77ffad714dea8d: ^1Rushmore: ^7Crawler down. Disappointing! Wait for another to come along.
hash_4da3a803dec29a10: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I know how it feels -- I had similar headache one time!
hash_4da3ab03dec29f29: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I -- like all of us -- have little time.
hash_4da3ae03dec2a442: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7They say nature is cruel, but honestly?     I'd be WAY crueler!
hash_4dc4bb0b4983a7a4: ^1Dempsey: ^7Come on, lil' buddy. Tank's got ya.
hash_4dc4bc0b4983a957: ^1Nikolai: ^7You are very good at falling down.
hash_4dc4be0b4983acbd: ^1Richtofen: ^7I think you have a mean streak MY Takeo does not. I don't like it.
hash_4dcc1878fd3de88a: ^1Rushmore: ^7Boy, you are starting to get on my nerves. Okay, a boy tells his teacher his cat had seven kittens and they're all communists.     A week later, he says the kittens are now all capitalists. "What changed?" asks the teacher. "They opened their eyes."
hash_4dd7280110f6db5d: ^1Nikolai: ^7Looks can be deceiving, Richtofen. Sometimes -- maybe this time -- there is more than meets eye.
hash_4de0e53d945d6810: ^1Takeo: ^7This is rare instance where quantity is better than quality.
hash_4de0f23d945d7e27: ^1Richtofen: ^7Oh, wunderbar. The universe is laughing at me again. Should I join in? Ha. Ha. Ha.
hash_4de0f33d945d7fda: ^1Dempsey: ^7Unless that thing is full auto, I doubt it'll do me much good.
hash_4de0f43d945d818d: ^1Nikolai: ^7Elegant weapon of skill and subtlety. In other words, not for Nikolai.
hash_4de4756d1493f0c0: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I must remember to thank Tank. Thanks, Tank!
hash_4de4786d1493f5d9: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I will have last laugh.  Ha Ha. That was not it -- only practice.
hash_4de47b6d1493faf2: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7You are too kind!     Especially to Nikolai -- he's an idiot.
hash_4df3bfdc4fc41eec: ^1Nikolai: ^7That hurt more than just Nikolai's pride.
hash_4df3c0dc4fc4209f: ^1Dempsey: ^7Every time a freakbag hits me, a devil gets his wings.
hash_4df3c1dc4fc42252: ^1Richtofen: ^7I am a doctor! Show some respect for the hippopotamus oath!
hash_4df3c6dc4fc42ad1: ^1Takeo: ^7A thousand such flesh-wounds cannot stop me from -- OWW!!!
hash_4e3b225c0076247b: ^1Takeo: ^7You can thank me later, my friends.

hash_4e5c711ecfa3c220: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Of course I have no money! Wife Number Two took all!
hash_4e5c721ecfa3c3d3: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Wouldja accept a moth from my coin-purse?    Hey, it works in cartoons...
hash_4e5c741ecfa3c739: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I must fill my war-chest by killing more demons. Hnh. It's a living...
hash_4e5c771ecfa3cc52: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Dempsey, come assist me with the exchange rate. Your country's trying to rob me blind!
hash_4e68e50bdd38787c: ^1Dempsey: ^7Take it there was more than one. Right, Tak?
hash_4e68e60bdd387a2f: ^1Nikolai: ^7We have done much, Takeo -- but more remains.
hash_4e68e80bdd387d95: ^1Richtofen: ^7No need to thank me. We're all just one big happy family.
hash_4ea117e82fc46028: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Here's an idea, Takeo -- when you fall down, try getting up!
hash_4ea11de82fc46a5a: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I do not think Emperor would like to see you on floor.
hash_4ea11ee82fc46c0d: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Show me who hurt you. I'll make 'em regret it.
hash_4ea6b757cfa9279f: ^1Rushmore: ^7Once more unto the breach, eh? Keep this one alive and I'll forget the last one.
hash_4eaece876941463c: ^1Nikolai: ^7You are a fighter, Takeo. You always have been.
hash_4eaecf87694147ef: ^1Dempsey: ^7Hope everyone's watching Takeo -- he knows EXACTLY what to do!
hash_4eaed087694149a2: ^1Richtofen: ^7Some people have to learn the hard way, Takeo. Me included, sadly.
hash_4ec02a65b4a8dee0: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I wish I'd had this in boarding school.
hash_4ec02f65b4a8e75f: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7"Galva-knuckles" does not roll easily off my tongue.
hash_4ec03165b4a8eac5: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I'll be playin' some chin-music today.
hash_4ee0f8b6d038ca36: ^1Richtofen: ^7Let us see what this place is like with the lights on.
hash_4ee105b6d038e04d: ^1Takeo: ^7Now this place will give up its secrets.
hash_4ef4a287af9fffaf: ^1Richtofen: ^7Monkey, mein monkey. Ready to play your dirge of death?
hash_4ef4a387afa00162: ^1Dempsey: ^7Clash-clash, boom-boom. You know the drill, monkey.
hash_4ef4a487afa00315: ^1Nikolai: ^7My smallest comrade is also my bravest.
hash_4ef4a587afa004c8: ^1Takeo: ^7Duty, self-sacrifice, and never a complaint. The perfect soldier.     But, monkey.
