hash_4f1d94a7567e6260: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Now we are really open for business.
hash_4f1d99a7567e6adf: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Let us find the 'Pack' quickly. The clock is ticking...
hash_4f1d9aa7567e6c92: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Just when I was starting to enjoy gas...
hash_4f1d9ba7567e6e45: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Excellent. Now we can get to the good stuff.
hash_4f2f2f032fe2832a: ^1Dempsey: ^7Off you go, to that great kennel in the sky.
hash_4f3029de42970f9f: ^1Rushmore: ^7By now you may have encountered our A.D.A.M. Units -- artificial humanoids all around the facility.    One of them in the Interrogation area has a human life force trapped inside. It happened during the incident that shut down this facility -- don't ask me to explain.    That life force belongs to someone very important to humanity's future, but you must repair the unit to free him.     The Spirit of Seventy-six!
hash_4f41a8f7ae001b80: ^1Richtofen: ^7Ach! Shotguns always ruin the nice clean lines of my uniform.
hash_4f41aaf7ae001ee6: ^1Nikolai: ^7Chekhov says if shotgun is seen in first act, it will be used to kill hell-pigs.
hash_4f41abf7ae002099: ^1Dempsey: ^7Y'know, if guns had ranks, shotguns would be the sergeants.     Know what I'm sayin'?
hash_4f72a349b196c644: ^1Avogadro: ^7Do they know where you are leading them, Nikolai? Do they know what awaits them?
hash_4f7efd27cc793e9f: ^1Takeo: ^7I can use my electric spikes now.
hash_4f7f0027cc7943b8: ^1Richtofen: ^7My lovely ground-pounder is ready for use.
hash_4f831d6dbff2f87f: ^1Avogadro: ^7I have ascended -- You are mere ants to me!
hash_4fcc3f6d8a15ebb4: ïŋ―%m/ïŋ―rQïŋ―ïŋ―YRïŋ―ïŋ―/ïŋ―1ïŋ―Aïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―6Âïŋ―iïŋ―C0ïŋ―mYÂĄ5)Xéïŋ―.ïŋ―tion either, Richtofen...but frankly, it looks a lot sweeter than some of the places you've dragged us to.
hash_4ff440086b3e3a71: ^1Rushmore: ^7Return the element 115 canister to the Transfusion Facility.    The arsenal of democracy!
hash_5001241f6607db9e: ^1Rushmore: ^7You'll want a nice fire to heat up that canister. Pick a good place to ignite one.
hash_501bef9bda60fbf4: ^1Rushmore: ^7What part of "don't let it overheat" did you not understand?
hash_501f120bef37e134: ^1Nikolai: ^7Nikolai knows his way around one of these.
hash_501f130bef37e2e7: ^1Dempsey: ^7Oh, yeah. "Assault" is my middle name. Or maybe it's "rapid-fire"...
hash_501f140bef37e49a: ^1Richtofen: ^7"Assault rifle." Such a curious name. What next?     A "stab knife"?
hash_5039cca635f51ef0: ^1Richtofen: ^7Well done, Nikolai. You've really got this leadership thing down!
hash_5039cfa635f52409: ^1Dempsey: ^7Not looking good, Nikolai. You gonna bring out the big guns?
hash_5050ca851588eb49: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7It is better this way, Crawler-san.
hash_50812a514bb0a8a4: ^1Richtofen: ^7The other Nikolai isn't here right now, but I'm sure he's watching with pride as you try your absolute hardest.     Like a little puppy with undeveloped hind legs.
hash_508d994def7d484c: ^1Nikolai: ^7I knew excellent female sniper in Stalingrad. I could use her help.
hash_508d9a4def7d49ff: ^1Dempsey: ^7Box, you got me mixed up with someone who likes to shoot real slow.
hash_508d9b4def7d4bb2: ^1Richtofen: ^7Und will the undead line up politely to be shot? I think not.
hash_50e1cf5f3ce46db2: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I'm pretty sure it's American, so there's a good chance that it's actually less than meets the eye.
hash_50e8ec4f68abd375: ^1Takeo: ^7I do not wish to be ungrateful, but that tasted like poop.
hash_50f6f71fbaa61e7f: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I've only known you for a short time, German, but
hash_50fbdd9231ff06a6: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7This is beautiful neighborhood! Who are millionaires who live is such luxury??
hash_511017a3c6799167: ^1Rushmore: ^7You will have to refill the life force canisters.     Once they're charged, I can use the telepad system to send Avogadro where he can't hurt anyone.
hash_51126544468b49a0: ^1Dempsey: ^7Told you before -- I am not here to play.
hash_51126644468b4b53: ^1Nikolai: ^7If it was so easy, everyone would do it.
hash_51126844468b4eb9: ^1Richtofen: ^7Ten years ago, I would definitely have missed that shot.     Especially since I wasn't here.
hash_51127344468b616a: ^1Takeo: ^7I strike unseen, unheard...     A shadow, a secret...like ghost.
hash_5123e9987bf90fd8: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7You should have gotten your jolts from bottle. Like Nikolai!
hash_5123ea987bf9118b: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Anything called a Joltin' Jack deserves to die.
hash_5123ec987bf914f1: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Apologies, glow-crawler, but you were truly agrravating.
hash_5123ef987bf91a0a: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Jolting Jack. Revolting Jack. How about just plain Dead Jack?
hash_5147fcf1aeb9aa8c: ^1Richtofen: ^7It's been a while Mark II, but you've still got it.
hash_5147fef1aeb9adf2: ^1Nikolai: ^7Mark II may be twice as good as Mark I!
hash_5147fff1aeb9afa5: ^1Dempsey: ^7One, two, three! Didn't even need a four.
hash_514801f1aeb9b30b: ^1Takeo: ^7An unnatural weapon -- for an unnatural enemy!
hash_514e0a5594d1b0e0: ^1Richtofen: ^7Ith it jutht me, or did my tongue go to thleep?
hash_514e0d5594d1b5f9: ^1Dempsey: ^7Smells like diesel, tastes like high test.
hash_51768d606052598b: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Automation has damaged the way of life for many. Now it is demon's turn.
hash_51768e6060525b3e: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Maybe I have drink while trap does all work.
hash_51768f6060525cf1: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I've always been good at improvising -- once fixed a crossbow with just the waistband of my tighty whities...
hash_5176906060525ea4: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Sometimes it's nice just to kick back, and let a trap do all the work for you!
hash_5178222c18973613: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7If I had a pfennig for every time I felt like doing that...!
hash_5178272c18973e92: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Medic! We got a man down!
hash_5178282c18974045: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Huh. You look like I feel.
hash_5181c66bffdb59c2: ^1Dempsey: ^7Who wants to watch me play taps on this overgrown bullet-bugle?
hash_5181c76bffdb5b75: ^1Nikolai: ^7What does Dempsey say? "I am hitting pot-of-jack"?
hash_5181c86bffdb5d28: ^1Takeo: ^7The nodachi was the longest, heaviest samurai sword. This...is the nodachi of machine-guns.
hash_518286507cb50374: ^1Rushmore: ^7Okay, you proved your patriotism.    So there's just one more Core Value to go.
hash_518cb2e114396909: ^1Nikolai: ^7I am in no mood for you.
hash_51a3a8a2e638d6e4: ^1Dempsey: ^7Damn right I've got a ray gun!
hash_51b5283efb74f8d1: ^1Avogadro: ^7That is as close as you'll get to hurting me.

hash_51b9ead2598f0d53: ^1Takeo: ^7These...fart-demons are the least honorable things I have ever seen.
hash_51b9f5d2598f2004: ^1Richtofen: ^7Weaponized flatulence. I doubt there's a Nobel prize in that.
hash_51bc3e2d1fc19a4e: ïŋ―cïŋ―ïŋ―nïŋ―'ïŋ―ïŋ―1ïŋ―&ïŋ―ïŋ―Lkiïŋ―ïŋ―Uïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―q01^ïŋ―ïŋ―`ïŋ―ïŋ―8ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ßŧpïŋ―ïŋ―,ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―%PSïŋ―ËRïŋ―sïŋ―hïŋ―&ïŋ―ïŋ―jn+ïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―sbc|ïŋ―|ïŋ―ïŋ―0\Hïŋ―ïŋ―ïŋ―*ïŋ―ïŋ―P\vïŋ―ïŋ―Kïŋ―ïŋ―&Iïŋ―&ïŋ―	,8htofen: ^7Honestly, I think you RUINED his day.
hash_51c6e1da0677066f: &ïŋ―	,8htofen: ^7Honestly, I think you RUINED his day.
hash_51c6e3da067709d5: ^1Nikolai: ^7I expect that took years of training, Dempsey. MANY YEARS.
hash_51c6e4da06770b88: ^1Takeo: ^7...and you only needed one bullet? Most efficient, Dempsey!
hash_51c91e9afe756d82: ^1Rushmore: ^7Excellent! Ingenious use of the telepad system. Now go charge that canister.
hash_51e0c7ceeb471ce6: ^1Takeo: ^7A second core value. Will it be as arbitrary as the first?
hash_51e0d1ceeb472de4: ^1Dempsey: ^7I like it better when the gear keeps its mouth shut, but you do you.
hash_51e0d2ceeb472f97: ^1Nikolai: ^7Is going to be long day. Though this I knew already.
hash_51e0d4ceeb4732fd: ^1Richtofen: ^7A machine that thinks it's actually a living person. Distant relative, Dempsey?
hash_51ecd5d8109e695e: ^1Dempsey: ^7No offense, "Richtofen," but I trust you about as far as I can throw you. Which is probably 10 yards -- with a good wind behind me.
hash_51fc4dd93ab7686f: ^1Dempsey: ^7I ain't gonna shock myself am I?
hash_51fc4ed93ab76a22: ^1Richtofen: ^7So much static!!! I should hold it above Takeo's head and make his hair go all funny.
hash_51fc53d93ab772a1: ^1Takeo: ^7I think this will prove most enlightening.
hash_5206e39a933e4c78: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Fine. Nikolai will use. But Nikolai will not enjoy.
hash_5206e49a933e4e2b: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7You know what victory sounds like? "Clang-clang-bang."
hash_5206e69a933e5191: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Dempsey says you do not monkey around. Is this praise? Or just..."platitude"?
hash_5206e99a933e56aa: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7What is it, little primate? What are you trying to tell me?     Whisper if you have to!
hash_523e3aa1694f45e7: ^1Samantha: ^7Then we're going back to the house to kill him, and burn it all to the ground.   (beat)  Agartha. The Aether. The Infinite.   (beat)  Everything.
hash_524d500954651d9c: ^1Dempsey: ^7Wow! Nearly took your head clean off!
hash_524d510954651f4f: ^1Nikolai: ^7I practice aim on rotten turnips.     That is also new name for you.
hash_524d5309546522b5: ^1Richtofen: ^7Good news -- your head now has an extra hole.     Do with it what you will.
hash_524d5609546527ce: ^1Takeo: ^7Like small tree, I cut you down.
hash_524ec501ca07d633: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7This is no regular rifle. Really. Not regular.
hash_524ec601ca07d7e6: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Perfect. Now I have many bullets!     If only I could share with friends.
hash_524ec801ca07db4c: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Come here, liebchen. Let us make terrible music together.     DISCORD!
hash_528d8c2e3f8f97f3: ^1Marlton: ^7I believe we are experiencing some sort of inter-dimensional subatomic shift!    That -- or something is seriously wrong with my lower digestive...tract.
hash_529e8ca941ff3693: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Oh, I can't argue with that, Takeo. They definitely seem to be at least a teensy bit "down in the dumpsters."
hash_52a15a9f667c15b9: ^1Takeo: ^7Nikolai -- leader of men, shooter of skulls.

hash_684b7dbfe35380c1: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7If I'm honest, I'm surprised you're still here,
hash_684b7ebfe3538274: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7My boy Tak is takin' names...and heads.
hash_684b7fbfe3538427: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Remember, Takeo, Hell-Pig heads are very overripe.     Like Grandmother's pumpkins.
hash_684c1e50bdf0ddf9: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Sadly, I believe he is not here. It is a pity. He was like better, stronger, more reliable Russian.
hash_687e412abc3e8599: ^1Richtofen: ^7Do you want help, Takeo? I "might" be able to fit you in.

hash_6888afff222f8c86: ^1Nikolai: ^7You would not be so mocking if you knew what I have seen Richtofen.     You would cower in fear, and beg for his mercy.

hash_68bbcabfbbd72125: ^1Avogadro: ^7Make it easy on yourselves, and just die!
hash_69042855cd3ec660: ^1Avogadro: ^7You think this will stop me? You have no idea what I have become.
hash_6945529c3e28c75d: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7You speak with honor, Thinner Nikolai. I pledge my blade and service to your cause.
hash_694e83dd745b98d0: ^1Nikolai: ^7Good work, Monkey -- especially the blowing up bit!
hash_694e84dd745b9a83: ^1Dempsey: ^7Hope that Monkey at least got some R&R recently...
hash_694e85dd745b9c36: ^1Richtofen: ^7That Monkey was one in a million. Well, I mean -- they're not exactly rare.
hash_694e92dd745bb24d: ^1Takeo: ^7So many simians sacrificed in our name.
hash_6964f5586ed11258: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7That's your biscuit, good and buttered!
hash_6964f6586ed1140b: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7I like to leave my mark. "Nikolai was here." heh.
hash_6964f7586ed115be: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Even the littlest cut can cut deeply.
hash_6964fc586ed11e3d: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Sproing! Surprise! Right between your eyes!
hash_6965427905f8cb86: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Stand up, Tak! You ain't gonna do no good on the ground!
hash_6965437905f8cd39: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7You have dishonored self. You should clean up.
hash_6965457905f8d09f: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I just injected you with something. It's normal for your lips to go numb.
hash_6966932800b8f62b: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I have heard Dempsey call this a "side arm."     I call it big disappointment.
hash_6966942800b8f7de: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Is like starting gun for Olympics. I will use, especially if we decide to run away.
hash_6966952800b8f991: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Just wanted some bang for my buck.     So why am I the one gettin' banged?
hash_6966962800b8fb44: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Oh, stupendous. My undead children will quiver in fear when I wave this about!

hash_6a0e7050519b73fa: ^1Richtofen: ^7Okay I've decided. Tank's too impersonal. Doesn't really give any sense of the long and joyous history we share.     For simplicity, I'm just going to call you "Stupid Dempsey."

hash_7176cd6bf8e94612: ^1Rushmore: ^7And now, the fifth and final core value of Project Broken Arrow: Prepare for Tomorrow and Humanity's Future.    For as long as we are prepared, humanity will have a future.

hash_74486f17d9e4ab1f: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7I find headshots a little passe, but that was quite impressive. Well done, you.

hash_7487f313c2b77c95: ^1Richtofen: ^7Did your wives ever have to pick you up off the floor? I'm guessing yes.
hash_7487f613c2b781ae: ^1Takeo: ^7Whenever you fall, one of us will come to your aid. That is what allies do.

hash_74b27c28e6f22e34: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7*BUUUUUUUURP* Sorry did not mean to do right in face.
hash_74b27d28e6f22fe7: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I'm gonna keep this between us.
hash_74b53ed186634549: ^1Takeo: ^7This machine is comfortingly familiar. Everything else here is madness.
hash_74b547d186635494: ^1Nikolai: ^7Where in hell is elemental shard? Could be hidden anywhere...
hash_74b549d1866357fa: ^1Richtofen: ^7Smells just like the weapons mother used to bake.
hash_74e03cb838c3de38: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Death from above, huh? You just made yerself a target!
hash_74e03db838c3dfeb: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7What is crawler doing way up there?
hash_74e03eb838c3e19e: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Electric crawlers clambering on ceilings? Crazy!
hash_74e043b838c3ea1d: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Climbing crawlers?! Well, America is all about upward mobility...
hash_74e2a6a765170c89: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7As near-death experiences go, yours was quite lame.
hash_74e2a7a765170e3c: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Why do I feel like I spend half my time pickin' your sorry ass up?
hash_74e2a9a7651711a2: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7I will help you return to duty, Russian.
hash_74ffd1149e3fc130: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Dempsey, dear Dempsey. I am not quite as self-obsessed as you seem to think. Not EVERYTHING is about me, you know!
hash_74ffe1d1619b3542: ^1Takeo: ^7Oh, my favorite type of gun. It may be all downhill from here...
hash_74ffe3d1619b38a8: ^1Dempsey: ^7Sold! To the man with lots of targets and a schedule to keep!
hash_74ffe4d1619b3a5b: ^1Nikolai: ^7Are you lost, little gun? Nikolai will be your friend...until he makes better one.
hash_74ffe6d1619b3dc1: ^1Richtofen: ^7It beats lugging around a gun half my size.
hash_752c81c4e0489f73: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7The future is now. And it will disintegrate you.
hash_752c84c4e048a48c: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7Perhaps my luck is changing.     FINALLY!
hash_752c86c4e048a7f2: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Looks silly. Sounds silly. Kills just fine.
hash_752c87c4e048a9a5: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Ray gun runs on batteries. Nikolai runs on vodka. All is well.
hash_752de7472eb95af1: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7I'm just mad that I don't get more time to hang out with brother from another mother. He seems like a good dude.
hash_7530686b202b19eb: ^1Rushmore: ^7There's a poor soul counting on you. Stay with the orb and get it there.
hash_754a265f768a77e0: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7Oh, that one went straight to my spleen.
hash_754a2b5f768a805f: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7If I can swallow Richtofen's lies, I can swallow this beverage.
hash_754a2c5f768a8212: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7Dempsey would like this. Is weak, like American beer.
hash_754a2d5f768a83c5: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7If I can stomach Richtofen, I can stomach anything.
hash_757222ae8ce07918: ^1Ultimis Richtofen: ^7What next? "Ballistic spork"? Oooh!  I like that idea!
hash_757227ae8ce08197: ^1Ultimis Takeo: ^7The last thing to go through a demon's mind will be this blade.
hash_757228ae8ce0834a: ^1Ultimis Nikolai: ^7"Ballistic knife." Hmm...could I use as ballistic back-scratcher?
hash_757229ae8ce084fd: ^1Ultimis Dempsey: ^7Been a while since I seen one of these. What is it?
hash_758037496c739cd0: ^1Dempsey: ^7Shotgun! Now, that's what I'm talkin' about! SHOTGUN!
hash_758038496c739e83: ^1Nikolai: ^7I got first shotgun when I was sixteen...    Months.
hash_75803a496c73a1e9: ^1Richtofen: ^7Dempsey and Nikolai ADORE shotguns. Of course, they also adore eating paint chips...
hash_758045496c73b49a: ^1Takeo: ^7I will use this if I must. But there is little honor in such weapons.
hash_75865dc5621b7c5f: ^1Richtofen: ^7I guess I should roll up mein sleeves...
hash_75865ec5621b7e12: ^1Dempsey: ^7Who wants to go a few rounds?
hash_75865fc5621b7fc5: ^1Nikolai: ^7Is it punch or shock that kills them? Who cares...?
hash_758660c5621b8178: ^1Takeo: ^7Ugly thing, but I shall use it beautifully.

hash_75cf5e69d8f54730: ^1Nikolai: ^7Rushmore! What is meaning of this? You promised Elemental Shard!
